name: Sheryl Underwood
bio: Sheryl Underwood is an American stand-up comedian, actress, and television host who rose through the 1990s comedy circuit on HBO's Def Comedy Jam and BET's ComicView. Known for a brash, rapid-fire club style, she later hosted ComicView herself and became a daytime talk-show fixture as a co-host of CBS's The Talk. Her comedy leans on candid talk about relationships, the body, and everyday life.

timeline.ev: First female finalist in the Miller Lite Comedy Search
Wins BET Funniest Female Comedian on ComicView
Wins BET Comedy Awards Platinum Mic Viewers Choice Award
Joins CBS daytime talk show The Talk as co-host
Wins Daytime Emmy with The Talk hosting team

accolades: Daytime Emmy Award winner as co-host of The Talk (2017)
BET Funniest Female Comedian on ComicView (1994)
BET Comedy Awards Platinum Mic Viewers Choice Award (2005)
